text: In the first scene, I feel a sense of sterility and anticipation. The neat, modern meeting room behind the glass feels both inviting and a little cold, as if ideas are waiting to be born there. In the second scene, I am struck by the vibrancy and creativity radiating from the colorful R+D display. The juxtaposition of technology and design makes me appreciate the relentless pursuit of innovation, and I feel curious about the progress happening here. Together, these spaces stimulate my mind and make me reflect on how environments shape our thoughts and collaborations.
